Content-Transfer-Encoding.description: The content transfer encoding if enabled

Content-Type.description: The content type sent with the message with a possible boundary

From.description: The full 'From' email address entry of the email

Message-Id.description: The unique identifier of the message as defined by [RFC-2392](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc2392)

Mime-Version.description: The MIME version of the email

X-Mailgun-Tag.description: The raw tags of the message if provided

sender.description: Just the email address from the provided 'From'' field

recipients.description: A list of email addresses from the 'To'' field

body-html.description: The full HTML body of the full message

body-plain.description: The plain text body of the full message

stripped-html.description: Only the body of the email in HTML

stripped-text.description: Only the body of the email in plain text

stripped-signature.description: The signature stripped from the body

message-headers.description: The full list of headers of the MIME upon send

X-Mailgun-Template-Name.description: The name of the template if one was used

X-Mailgun-Template-Variables.description: The variables used in the template if one was used
